commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an embedded-run internal source-reply sink for automatic/message-tool-only text-only current-source message sends, wires Codex app-server opt-in, and expands outbound/runner tests for structured escape paths.

PR surface: Source +223, Tests +588. Total +811 across 16 files.

Reproducibility: Partly. Source inspection shows current main does not consume automatic implicit message-tool sends into the internal source-reply sink, and the PR includes live mitigation logs, but I did not establish a full current-main or patched Feishu/Lark reproduction.
